since_last: 34% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.67%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 34% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -1.49% · Gold -0.95% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 34% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.67%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, Chip Equipment & AI Hardware lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.67%; weakest is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at -2.07%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -4.67%
cards.body: Leaders: TTD +2.27%, DV +1.88%, LSCC +1.68%, NOW +1.65%, INTU +1.37%. Laggards: MU -4.67%, AMAT -4.56%, TER -4.06%, KLAC -4.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.93% at $143.95
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
